ns0:entry.ns0:title: 2dust/v2rayN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/2dust/v2rayN
Language: c%23
A GUI client for Windows, Linux and macOS, support Xray and sing-box and others

ns0:entry.ns0:title: BigheadSMZ/Zelda-LA-DX-HD-Updated
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BigheadSMZ/Zelda-LA-DX-HD-Updated
Language: c%23
Windows, Android, and Linux ports of TLoZ: LADXHD updated via a patcher.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataDog/dd-trace-dotnet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-dotnet
Language: c%23
.NET Client Library for Datadog APM

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Facepunch/sbox-public
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Facepunch/sbox-public
Language: c%23
s&box is a modern game engine, built on Valve's Source 2 and the latest .NET technology, it provides a modern intuitive editor for creating games

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JosefNemec/Playnite
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JosefNemec/Playnite
Language: c%23
Video game library manager with support for wide range of 3rd party libraries and game emulation support, providing one unified interface for your games.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MudBlazor/MudBlazor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MudBlazor/MudBlazor
Language: c%23
Blazor Component Library based on Material Design principles with an emphasis on ease of use and extensibility

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Perfare/Il2CppDumper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Perfare/Il2CppDumper
Language: c%23
Unity il2cpp reverse engineer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Prowlarr/Prowlarr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Prowlarr/Prowlarr
Language: c%23
Prowlarr is an indexer manager/proxy built on the popular *arr .net/reactjs base stack to integrate with your various PVR apps, supporting management of both Torrent Trackers and Usenet Indexers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Tyrrrz/YoutubeDownloader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tyrrrz/YoutubeDownloader
Language: c%23
Downloads videos and playlists from YouTube

ns0:entry.ns0:title: UnigramDev/Unigram
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/UnigramDev/Unigram
Language: c%23
Telegram for Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bloxstraplabs/bloxstrap
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bloxstraplabs/bloxstrap
Language: c%23
An alternative bootstrapper for Roblox with a bunch of extra features.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/aspnetcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/efcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/efcore
Language: c%23
EF Core is a modern object-database mapper for .NET. It supports LINQ queries, change tracking, updates, and schema migrations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/skills
Language: c%23
Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C#

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kwsch/PKHeX
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/PowerToys
Language: c%23
Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nesrak1/UABEA
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nesrak1/UABEA
Language: c%23
c# uabe for newer versions of unity

ns0:entry.ns0:title: seerge/g-helper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/seerge/g-helper
Language: c%23
Lightweight, open-source control tool for ASUS laptops and ROG Ally. Manage performance modes, fans, GPU, battery, and RGB lighting across Zephyrus, Flow, TUF, Strix, Scar, and other models.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tModLoader/tModLoader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tModLoader/tModLoader
Language: c%23
A mod to make and play Terraria mods. Supports Terraria 1.4 (and earlier) installations

ns0:entry.ns0:title: umlx5h/LLPlayer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/umlx5h/LLPlayer
Language: c%23
The media player for language learning, with dual subtitles, AI-generated subtitles, real-time translation, and more!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: yaobiao131/downkyicore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/yaobiao131/downkyicore
Language: c%23
哔哩下载姬(跨平台版)downkyi，哔哩哔哩网站视频下载工具，支持批量下载，支持8K、HDR、杜比视界，提供工具箱（音视频提取、去水印等）。
